name: Planning for Emerging Industry-Standard Platforms Computing Opportunities
description: Aberdeen white paper produced in collaboration with Intel Corporation analyzing the three critical technology building blocks arriving in 2003-2004: DDR2 memory, IPMI systems management, and serial I/O (PCI Express). Covers Xeon, Itanium 2, new chipsets (Lindenhurst, Nocona, Potomac/Twin Castle), and the transition from parallel PCI-X to PCI Express. Aimed at IT planners for 2004 server acquisitions.
